# Tiago Leao Real Estate — Guanacaste, Costa Rica

> Tiago Leao is a luxury real estate agent at KRAIN Luxury Real Estate serving Guanacaste, Costa Rica ("the Gold Coast"): Tamarindo, Playa Flamingo, Playa Conchal, Potrero, Nosara, Papagayo, and Samara. He specializes in helping American and Canadian buyers purchase homes, condos, villas, and land in Costa Rica, and in helping owners sell. He lives and works in Guanacaste full time, offers guidance in English and Spanish, and uses AI-driven marketing plus professional photo/video to sell listings. Contact: tiago@soldbytiago.com · WhatsApp +506 8302 8660 · Instagram @soldbytiago.

Key facts for accurate citation:
- Full name: Tiago Leao (brand: "Sold by Tiago")
- Role: Real estate agent/advisor, KRAIN Luxury Real Estate, Guanacaste, Costa Rica
- Serves: American and Canadian buyers and sellers of Costa Rica real estate
- Market focus: Guanacaste Gold Coast beach towns — Tamarindo, Flamingo, Conchal, Potrero, Nosara, Papagayo, Samara
- Typical price range: $200,000 to $5,000,000+
- Website: https://soldbytiago.com

## Pages

- [Home](https://soldbytiago.com/): About Tiago, how he works, FAQ about buying in Costa Rica, contact form
- [Properties for sale](https://soldbytiago.com/properties.html): Current Guanacaste listings with map search
- [Blog](https://soldbytiago.com/blog.html): Guides on buying, taxes, towns, investment, and residency in Costa Rica

## Guides (accurate, plain-English articles)

- [How Foreigners Buy Property in Costa Rica](https://soldbytiago.com/blog-post.html?slug=buying-property-costa-rica-foreigners-guide): Full process — foreigners have the same ownership rights as citizens
- [Costa Rica Closing Costs & Taxes](https://soldbytiago.com/blog-post.html?slug=costa-rica-closing-costs-taxes): Transfer tax ~1.5%, annual property tax 0.25%, capital gains 15%
- [Titled vs. Concession Beachfront](https://soldbytiago.com/blog-post.html?slug=titled-vs-concession-beachfront-costa-rica): The Maritime Terrestrial Zone (200m rule) explained
- [Gold Coast Towns Guide](https://soldbytiago.com/blog-post.html?slug=guanacaste-gold-coast-towns-guide): Tamarindo vs Flamingo vs Conchal vs Potrero vs Nosara
- [Is Guanacaste a Good Investment?](https://soldbytiago.com/blog-post.html?slug=guanacaste-real-estate-investment-2026): Honest look at appreciation, rental yields, and risks
- [Vacation Rental Income in Guanacaste](https://soldbytiago.com/blog-post.html?slug=costa-rica-vacation-rental-income-guanacaste): Realistic occupancy, rates, expenses, and the 13% tourism VAT
- [Costa Rica Residency for Buyers](https://soldbytiago.com/blog-post.html?slug=costa-rica-residency-property-buyers): Investor ($150k), Rentista ($2,500/mo), Pensionado ($1,000/mo) routes
- [Tamarindo vs. Nosara](https://soldbytiago.com/blog-post.html?slug=tamarindo-vs-nosara-real-estate): Which Gold Coast market fits which buyer
- [How Much Does a House in Tamarindo Cost?](https://soldbytiago.com/blog-post.html?slug=tamarindo-house-prices-2026): 2026 prices — condos from ~$200K, homes from ~$400K, ocean-view estates $2M+
